original_image_tags: A dark, slightly textured document page with three hole punches visible on the left margin. At the top, centered, is the typed classification stamp "RESTRICTED". Below it is a single paragraph of typed text describing a sighting. At the bottom, centered, is the typed classification stamp "RESTRICTED". The bottom margin has two additional hole punches. A small number "31" is visible in the bottom right corner, likely a page number.

elements.description: The word 'RESTRICTED' stamped in large, faded capital letters at the top and bottom of the page. The rest of the page contains typed text describing an observation of three metallic discs and has two hole punches on the left margin.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of the 'RESTRICTED' stamps at the top and bottom and on the page's general typed content, and neither describes any actual images or visual content to compare.
